observations.summary: Aviel is described as a man of small stature due to years of hunching over his hoard, which has physically compressed him.

evidence.quote: He was not a tall man—years of hunching over his hoard had compressed him, made him smaller

observations.notes: This highlights Aviel's physical decline linked to his obsessive behavior.

observations.summary: In a particular moment, Aviel seemed to fill the room despite his small stature.

evidence.quote: but in that moment, he seemed to fill the room

observations.notes: Indicates a significant or commanding presence at a specific time.
